title: brachiaria ramosa var. grandiflora
intro: Brachiaria ramosa var. grandiflora, also known as giant brachiaria or elephant grass, is a type of tropical grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant has been found to have various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Brachiaria ramosa var. grandiflora include its ability to lower fever, reduce inflammation, and provide relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and skin disorders.
